findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 40. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Ensure the main landmark is at top level
findings.evidence:
Fix any of the following:
  The main landmark is contained in another landmark. [<main>]

findings.description: Ensure the document has at most one main landmark
findings.evidence:
Fix any of the following:
  Document has more than one main landmark [<main>]

Fix any of the following:
  The landmark must have a unique aria-label, aria-labelledby, or title to make landmarks distinguishable [<main>]

findings.description: Nested <main> elements in the HTML. The document has a <main> in the outer structure and another <main> inside it, which is invalid HTML structure.
findings.evidence: The HTML has <body><main>...<main>...</main></main></body> with two nested <main> elements.

findings.description: The cover page image (lake photo with NC State logo) appears as a figure in the body content area rather than being separated as a cover element, but this is a minor structural choice and does not duplicate content.
findings.evidence: The cover image is placed inline after the header section.
